			c-3.153-0.268-4.698,2.504-7.7,3.047c-0.612,0.11-1.903,0.191-2.864,0c-1.947-0.387-4.509-1.358-6.416-2.539
			c-3.196-1.979-4.326-5.043-3.457-11.174c0.662-4.666,2.254-8.068,3.752-11.681c0.689-1.659,1.358-4.308,2.369-5.079
			c0.91-0.695,2.326-0.805,3.554-1.142c1.282-0.353,2.618-0.694,3.853-0.762c2.67-0.145,5.41,0.882,8.293,0.762
			c3.708-0.154,7.76-2.657,11.749-2.032c0.744,0.116,1.975,0.35,2.566,0.89c0.669,0.604,1.127,2.324,1.581,3.302
			C48.441,811.594,50.138,818.434,48.946,826.706z"/>
		
			<text id="Номер18" onclick="Resize('18')" onmouseover="SF('18')" onmouseout="SF2('18')" transform="matrix(1 0 0 1 20.8057 822.4619)" fill="#413003" enable-background="new    " font-family="'MyriadPro-Bold'" font-size="13.3404">18</text>
	</g>
	<path fill="none" d="z"/>
		<script type="text/javascript">
		var mId = "Layer_1";
		var selzub = "";
		var selectzub;
		var mas='';
		var SelZubMas = new Array(49);
		var Color = "#ebd296"; 	
		document.oncontextmenu = function() {
		   return false; 
		}  	
	
		function Resize(id)
		{
		  // alert(mId);
		//	document.getElementById(mId).id = "Зуб"+ id;
		//	mId = "Зуб"+ id;
			xId = "Цвет"+id;    
			// alert(selzub +' ее '+xId);
			if (selzub != xId )
			{
			  if (selzub != "")
			  {                 
				if (SelZubMas[selzub.substring(4)] == null)
				{               
				  document.getElementById(selzub).style.fill = "#FFFFFF";
				}
				else
				{
				  document.getElementById(selzub).style.fill = Color;
				}
			  }
			}
			 if (document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.fill != "#6f98cf")
			{ 
			   document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.fill = "#6f98cf";//document.getElementById("color").style.color;       
			   selzub = "Цвет"+id;  
			}
			else
			{
			   if (SelZubMas[id] == null)
			   {
			   document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.fill = "#c9e2ff";
			   }
			   else
			   {
				  document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.fill = Color;
			   }
			   selzub = "";
			}    
		}
		function SF(id)
		{
		   document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.cursor = "pointer";
		   document.getElementById("Номер"+id).style.cursor = "pointer";
		   if (document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.fill != "#6f98cf")
		   {          
			 if (  document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.fill != Color){
			   document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.fill = "#c9e2ff";
			   }
		   }
		}
		function SF2(id)
		{
		 if (document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.fill != "#6f98cf")
		   {
		   if (  document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.fill != Color){       
			  document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.fill = "#FFFFFF";
			  }
		   }
		}
		function start(){
			if (selectzub != null)
		   {
			if ( document.getElementById("Цвет"+selectzub).style.fill != "#6f98cf"){
			  Resize(selectzub);
			 }else{
			  selzub = "Цвет"+selectzub;}
		   }
		   if (mas != "")
		   {
			 arr = mas.split(',');     
			 i = "f";
			 z = arr.length;
			 a = 0;      
			 for (;;){       
			   SelZubMas[arr[a]] = Color;
				if (selectzub != arr[a])
			  {   if (arr[a] < 49){
				  document.getElementById("Цвет"+arr[a]).style.fill = Color;}	
			   }       
			   a++;       
			   if (a == z){ 
				  break;
			   }     
			 }			
		   }	   
		}  
		start();
		</script>
	<style type="text/css">
	</style> 
	</svg>
